name: complete_code
description: Generate code completions using fill-in-the-middle (FIM) for IDE and code editor integrations. Provide a prompt prefix and optional suffix, and the model fills in the code between them.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The code model ID to use.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: The code prefix (text before the cursor position).

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.description: The code suffix (text after the cursor position).

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature. Lower values produce more deterministic code.
